name: @iap/compliance
description: Compliance engine for IaP (spec ch. 17): versioned framework bundles (SOC 2, PCI DSS 4.0, HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST 800-53, CIS 8.0) evaluated against the canonical document to produce IAP701 control findings and an evidence report (satisfied/violated/not-applicable per control). Compliance is embedded, evaluated at the intent level — never a claim of certification.
